subject: A stylized optical scope or telescopic sight gadget rendered as a cartoon item — concentric red, green, and yellow rings form the lens housing, viewed from above at a slight angle.
description: The card depicts a chunky, cartoonish telescopic sight or scope, shown from a slightly elevated angle. The lens assembly consists of concentric circular rings in red, green, and yellow, giving a colorful, toy-like appearance. The gadget sits against a plain pale yellow background with no environmental context. The art style is flat and illustrative, consistent with Pokemon trainer item cards.
foreground: colorful circular optical scope/lens in red, green, and yellow rings
